Result.Name: Pre Final Hold
Result.HoldReason: to prevent a finaled date from being placed on any permits (master or sub) when this type of hold is placed on a record.
Result.Comments:
RBPR-144683, CBPR-149498-2025 and the RABS must be closed simultaneously.
The commercial building permit (CBPR-149498-2025) for the sales office in the garage has passed all required inspections, and the Certificate of Compliance (COC) may now be issued. Crosland can occupy the sales office once the COC has been issued.

The residential building permit (RBPR-144683-2025) for the dwelling has also passed all inspections; however, the Certificate of Occupancy (CO) cannot be issued until the commercial sales office in the garage is converted back to a residential occupancy (typically restored to a garage or finished room).

When Crosland has completed use of the sales office, they can apply for a residential alteration permit to convert the space back to residential occupancy. Once that permit is completed and all inspections are approved, the CO for the dwelling (RBPR-144683-2025) may be issued.

In the meantime, the home may be stocked with furniture and used as a model home, since all inspections for the dwelling have been approved. Please review the attached N.C. General Statute related to the use of model homes for reference.
